macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Crypto market weakens broadly as Bitcoin, Ethereum and major altcoins fall
items.summary: The crypto market lost about 0.64% to a total capitalization of roughly $2.56 trillion, with Bitcoin down 0.84% below $77,000 and Ethereum down 0.79% below $2,100. XRP, Solana and Dogecoin also fell more than 1% amid geopolitical tension and hawkish Fed signals.

items.title: NEAR Protocol surges 15% on upgrade and AI enthusiasm
items.summary: NEAR rose another 15% in 24 hours, briefly topping $2.8 and reaching a six-month high, while the broader market weakened. The move was linked to NEAR's v2.13 network upgrade announced for June and renewed AI-sector interest.

items.title: Bitcoin demand weakens as market watches for a drop toward $72,000
items.summary: Cointelegraph reported that Bitcoin risked a decline to about $72,000 as a demand metric hit its lowest level of 2026. NewsNow also highlighted that Strategy skipped Bitcoin purchases this week as BTC demand hit a five-month low.

items.title: Strategy skips Bitcoin buys and retires $1.5 billion in debt
items.summary: Strategy reportedly skipped Bitcoin purchases this week while using cash reserves to buy back $1.5 billion in bonds. The move was framed alongside weakening Bitcoin demand and softer spot buying.

items.title: Georgia launches a Tether-backed stablecoin with central bank support
items.summary: Tether and Georgia launched GELT, a Georgian lari stablecoin, with the central bank's blessing. The development was presented as a notable example of official-sector support for stablecoin infrastructure.

items.title: XRP activity rises as whales withdraw from Binance ahead of token unlock
items.summary: NewsNow highlighted XRP whale withdrawals on Binance reaching their highest level since February, while another report noted Ripple will unlock 1 billion XRP next week. The combination points to elevated market attention around XRP supply dynamics.
items.source: DeFi Planet / Finance in Bold / NewsNow

items.title: NEAR, HYPE and other altcoins show outsized moves despite market pressure
items.summary: News feeds flagged Hyperliquid's rally, with Santiment warning about overheated positioning, while HYPE briefly overtook Dogecoin in a volatile session. These moves stood out against the broader market downturn.
items.source: The Crypto Basic / CoinDesk via CryptoNews

items.title: Security warning issued over new 'TrapDoor' virus targeting crypto wallets
items.summary: U.Today reported a new malware strain called TrapDoor that steals crypto wallets and targets Solana, DeFi and AI developers. The alert adds a security-development angle to the day's crypto news.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.
